prefill_service.fieldDescription: Select a prefill service to fetch form data when the form renders.
prefill_service.name: ./prefillService

roleAttribute.fieldDescription: HTML ROLE attribute to apply to the component.
roleAttribute.name: ./fd:roleAttribute

clientLibRef.fieldDescription: This client library contains JavaScript Functions which can be used in expressions supported by Adaptive Forms.
clientLibRef.name: ./clientLibRef

hamburgerMenu.name: ./fd:isHamburgerMenuEnabled
hamburgerMenu.text: Enable the hamburger menu for mobile view
hamburgerMenu.fieldDescription: Select the option to display the hamburger menu for efficient navigation on mobile devices.

thankYouMessage.value: Thank you for submitting the form.
thankYouMessage.name: ./thankYouMessage

enableAdobeSign.fieldDescription: Enable Adobe Sign for this form.
enableAdobeSign.name: ./_useSignedPdf

signConfigPath.fieldDescription: Select the Adobe Sign cloud service configuration.
signConfigPath.name: ./signerInfo/signConfigPath

workflowType.fieldDescription: Choose the order in which signers will receive and sign the document.
workflowType.name: ./signerInfo/workflowType

firstSignerFormFiller.fieldDescription: When selected, the person filling the form is also the first signer.
firstSignerFormFiller.name: ./signerInfo/firstSignerFormFiller
firstSignerFormFiller.text: Form filler is also first signer

signerMultifield.fieldDescription: Configure the list of signers for this form.
signerMultifield.name: ./signerInfo/signer

emailSource.fieldDescription: Choose how the signer's email address is provided.
emailSource.name: ./emailSource

emailAutocomplete.fieldDescription: Select the form field that contains the signer's email address.
emailAutocomplete.name: ./emailAutocomplete

securityOption.fieldDescription: Choose the authentication method for the signer.
securityOption.name: ./securityOption

countryCodeSource.fieldDescription: Choose how the country code is provided.
countryCodeSource.name: ./countryCodeSource

countryCodeAutocomplete.fieldDescription: Select the form field that contains the country code.
countryCodeAutocomplete.name: ./countryCodeAutocomplete

countryCode.fieldDescription: Enter the country code (e.g. +1 for USA).
countryCode.name: ./countryCode

phoneSource.fieldDescription: Choose how the phone number is provided.
phoneSource.name: ./phoneSource

phoneAutocomplete.fieldDescription: Select the form field that contains the phone number.
phoneAutocomplete.name: ./phoneAutocomplete

signFieldBlocks.fieldDescription: Select which Adobe Sign blocks this signer should fill or sign.
signFieldBlocks.fieldLabel: Adobe Sign fields to fill or sign
signFieldBlocks.name: ./signFieldBlocks

signerAfFieldsBlock.fieldDescription: Select Adaptive Form fields assigned to this signer.
signerAfFieldsBlock.name: ./signerAfFieldsBlock
